affected_pattern: Customer billed twice for same monthly charges with identical timestamps
root_cause: charge deduplication engine failure — the deduplication process was bypassed during a system restart, allowing duplicate billing records to pass through to the rating engine.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: billing record Deduplication Engine Failure pattern
IBM Telco Billing Operations Standards Section 4.3 (charge uniqueness) — billing record uniqueness requirements
System restart event logged 30 minutes before duplicate billing records appeared
recommended_action: Remove duplicate billing records from billing records
